# thoth_policy_change_artifact (Data Source)

Reads a policy change artifact for an exception request.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "thoth_policy_change_artifact" "crm_export" {
  request_id = thoth_policy_exception.crm_export.request_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `request_id` (String) Policy exception request ID.

### Read-Only

- `artifact_id` (String) Policy change artifact ID.
- `data_json` (String) Full policy change artifact as JSON.
- `target_environment` (String) Target environment for the artifact.
- `updated_at` (String) Last artifact update timestamp.
